dealImpacts.hint: Check to deal damage or other impacts.
dealImpacts.label: Deal Impacts

useAbilities.hint: Check to activate this armament's on-use abilities.
useAbilities.label: Use Abilities

existingAttackPenalty.hint: The existing attack penalty that will be applied to this attack.
existingAttackPenalty.label: Existing Attack Penalty

incurredAttackPenalty.hint: The change to your attack penalty that will be applied by making this attack
incurredAttackPenalty.label: Incurred Attack Penalty

boosts.hint: A number of boosts to apply.
boosts.label: Boosts

deboosts.hint: A number of deboosts to apply
deboosts.label: Deboosts

formula.hint: The original formula. Make changes as needed, but do not directly apply boosts or deboosts.
formula.label: Roll Formula

impacts.hint: The types of impact this deals.
impacts.label: Impacts

consumeUses.hint: Whether using this consumes one of its uses.
consumeUses.label: Consume Uses

useAbilities.hint: Check to activate this armament's on-use abilities.
useAbilities.label: Use Abilities

bonus.hint: An additional bonus to apply to this roll.
bonus.label: Circumstance Bonus
